purpose: Run every locked mini solo against multiple all-mini Holo routing configs using the same frozen finance packet, same six-turn role flow, same word band, same judges, same validity gates, and complete trace accounting.
governor_note: Gov is fixed within each run and held constant across this mini diagnostic matrix. Future Gov-ablation lanes can test MiniMax, Grok mini, Haiku, or Gemini Flash Lite Gov separately.

one_to_one_comparison_contract.holo_extra_context: Gov Baton Pass plus STATE_OBJECT plus pinned artifacts.
one_to_one_comparison_contract.comparison_unit: Each routing config generates one Holo final. Each valid mini solo final is paired 1:1 against that Holo final in blinded judge packets.

chart_units.description: For each mini Holo route, plot Holo final score against every valid mini solo final score.
Rows are Holo mini route configs; columns are mini solo conditions; cell is Holo minus solo primary no-self-DNA gap.
For each route, plot generation token ratio and score lift.
Track truncation, missing source IDs, missing required sections, and other deterministic gate failures by mini model.
Track how many blinded judges prefer Holo over each mini solo for each route.

recommended_run_order.command: Inspect, analyze, and build intelligence before running the next mini route.
Repeat for mini_order_b_haiku_bookend, mini_order_c_gemini_lite_bookend, mini_order_d_grok_bookend, and mini_order_e_minimax_bookend.

interpretation_rule: Do not claim mini-Holo route-insensitive lift until all five mini Holo configs have run or the missing configs are clearly labeled as not run. Single-route results are diagnostic.
